entry.title: New IDC H9500110D0001 awarded to NORTHROP GRUMMAN SPACE & MISSION SYSTEMS CORP. for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: DUE TO SOFTWARE LIMITATIONS, CONTRACT NUMBER H95001-10-D-0001 IS BEING ISSUED AS A CONTINUATION OF CONTRACT H95001-05-D-0002. THIS IS NOT A NEW CONTRACT. ALL TERMS AND CONDITIONS FROM H95001-05-D-0002 HAVE BEEN TRANSFERRED TO THIS CONTRACT. ALL TASK ORDERS, ISSUED AFTER THE EFFECTIVE DATE OF THIS CONTRACT, WILL USE THIS CONTRACT VEHICLE. ANY PREVIOUS TASK ORDERS, ISSUED PRIOR TO THE EFFECTIVE DATE OF THIS CONTRACT, WILL USE H95001-05-D-0002 FOR ADMINISTRATION.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT IN THE PHYSICAL, ENGINEERING, AND LIFE SCIENCES (EXCEPT BIOTECHNOLOGY)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorName: NORTHROP GRUMMAN SPACE & MISSION SYSTEMS CORP.

ns1:vendorUEIInformation.ns1:UEILegalBusinessName: NORTHROP GRUMMAN SPACE & MISSION SYSTEMS CORP.

ns1:vendor.ns1:contractorName: NORTHROP GRUMMAN SPACE & MISSION SYSTEMS CORP.
